case_title: BHAN SANDHU VS. BOLLYWOOD PRODUCTIONS AND TRAVEL SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SANDHU, BHAN AS TO DEFENDANT BOLLYWOOD PRODUCTIONS AND TRAVEL SERVICES PATEL, BHARAT M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY CO-DEFENDANT C AND H INTERNATIONAL ONLY. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDHU, BHAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT C & H INTERNATIONAL DEFENDANTS BOLLYWOOD PRODUCTIONS AND BHARAT PATEL DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
